name: 4-Day Tour: Marrakech → Sahara → Fes → Chefchaouen

seo.title: 4-Day Marrakech Sahara Fes Chefchaouen Tour — Imperial Cities & Desert | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: 4-day tour from Marrakech to Chefchaouen: Merzouga desert, Dades Gorges, Todra Gorges, medieval Fes, then Chefchaouen the blue city. Private transport included.

hero.tagline: From the Sahara to the Blue City in 4 days

intro: This 4-day tour takes you across the whole of Morocco, from Marrakech to Chefchaouen via the Merzouga desert and the medieval city of Fes. A perfect itinerary to discover the diversity of Moroccan landscapes and cultures in a short time.
